violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Observed boxes of food on floor in walk in freezer.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Observed items in walk in cooler and refrigerator that were not date marked.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Observed seal on walk in freezer was not sealing properly.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed dried food in microwave and refrigerator.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Observed boxes of food on floor in walk in freezer.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Observed multiple items in walk in cooler that were not date marked.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed inside of microwave and inside of refrigerator have dried food on floor and walls.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
